action: Reinstalled alternate airbox.  Performed ground engine run and adjusted fuel servo idle cutoff mixture.  All other engine indications normal.

problem: Fuel servo requires adjustment.
action: Adjusted fuel servo for correct idle RPM and mixture rise. No further defects noted.

problem: Rough running engine
action: Removed cylinder 1, 2, 3 and 4 bottom spark plugs.  Cleaned and inspected spark plugs finding all four serviceable.  Timed R/H magneto to 25 degrees BTC.  Cleaned and inspected all four fuel injector nozzles.  Installed new intake gasket and tightened loose hardware on #2 cylinder.  Perform engine ground run and adjusted fuel servo idle cutoff mixture.  All engine indications normal.

problem: Engine running rough at low power while landing (1500)rpm.
action: Ran engine, allowed oil to come to temp, put rpm setting at 1500rpm for 30seconds and ran with no issues, checked mags drops. No issue observed. Checked idle rpm and idle cutoff and no issues observed.

problem: On run up R/H engine R/H magneto had 300 RPM drop with big vibration. EGT on cylinder #2 peaked at 1864Â°.  With engine at idle #2 cylinder temp was 506Â°.
action: During engine ground run found #2 cylinder not firing with L/H magneto off and R/H magneto on.  Removed, cleaned and inspected R/H engine #2 cylinder upper and lower spark plugs. #2 cylinder lower spark plug failed during bench test.  Reinstalled #2 cylinder upper spark plug and installed new #2 cylinder lower spark plug.  Operational check good during engine ground run.  All engine indications normal.

problem: pilots reports,Upon take off/ climb out aircraft began to buffett/ vibrate quite apparently subsided when leveled off but would come back faintly when power applies. when we landed and rolled to idle the engine/ aircraft began to shudder quite apparently
action: Removed, cleaned, tested and installed all spark plugs, ops check good. Tested all ignition leads, ops check good. Performed mag check, checks good. inspected engine. no defects noted. See UND WKO# 1238063 for mx flight

problem: WHEN BRINGING THROTTLE UP FROM LOW RPM SETTING ENGINE WOULD HESITATE FOR 1-2 SECONDS BEFORE POWER FOLLOWED. THOUGHT ENGINE JUST NEEDED TO WARM UP, BUT AFTER RUN UP AND HAVING THE ENGINE RUNNING FOR 25MIN, ISSUE STILL OCCURED.
action: RAN AIRCRAFT UP THROUGH NORMAL RUNUP PROCEDURES. MAX RPM ON GROUND 2248, L/H MAG DROP 50, R/H MAG DROP 60, IDLE 790, MIXTURE RISE 10. FOUND SLIGHT HESITATION BETWEEN 900-1000 RPM. ALL EGT READINGS WERE FINE.

problem: Moving Power from Idle through 900 RPM Runs Rough.
action: Found Fuel Servo Throttle Linkage Has Slop. Disconnected Throttle and Mixture Cables from Fuel Servo. Removed Fuel Servo. Installed Repaired Fuel Servo Part# AV2581600 SN: AV56937217, Two New Fuel Servo Gaskets, and One New Air Box Gasket. Reinstalled Throttle and Mixture Cables and Installed New Cotter Pins. Travel Checks Good. Idle and Mixture Rise Checks Good. Leak Check Good. No Roughness in the 900 RPM Range.

problem: RH engine runup idle was 870 RPM
action: Adjusted RH eninge idle screw out 1/2 turn

problem: LH engine runup idle was 910 RPM
action: Adjusted LH engine idle screw out 1 turn

problem: RH engine runup idle was 870 RPM
action: On runup, turned screw in 1/4 turn. Ops check good

problem: LH engine runup idle was 910 RPM
action: On runup, turned screw in 7/8 turn. Ops check good

problem: Engine idle erratic and rough
action: Removed airbox and fuel servo, SN: AV263168.  Inspected fuel servo P/N 61J28702  S/N AV55917339 and found to be serviceable.  Installed serviceable fuel servo P/N 61J28702  S/N AV55917339 and reattached airbox, throttle, and mixture controls and safetied.  Attach fuel lines and torqued fittings to spec,  applied torque stripe.  Leak check system.

problem: Engine idle erratic and rough
action: Performed ground engine run.  Adjusted idle cutoff mixture.  All other engine indications normal during ground run.

problem: Idle was 520 RMP
action: Adjusted idle screw in 1/8 turn. Ops check good

problem: LH engine 50 RPM rise on ICO
action: ADJUSTED L/H ENGINE IDLE AND MIXTURE

problem: RH engine 810 RPM idle, 50 RPM rise on ICO
action: ADJUSTED R/H ENGINE IDLE AND MIXTURE

problem: NO MIXTURE RISE ON POST RUN.
action: ADJUSTED MIXTURE AND IDLE, IDLE 710 MIX RISE 20. OPS CHECK GOOD.

problem: Run-up & flight worked fine, taxi back & took until 20mp to get above 840rpm on left engine before rising
action: Ground ran AC. Adjusted mixture and idle settings. Ops and leak checks good

problem: Engine roughness
action: Performed ground engine run.  All engine indications read normal with good magneto drops.  Fuel servo idle/cutoff mixture was normal.  Could not duplicate reported discrepancy.

problem: Alternator belt idler pulley bolt has no thread protrusion
action: Replaced bolt on alternator belt idler pulley with new AN6-14A, torqued alternator belt to spec.

problem: Engine died after start up
action: Found engine idle was low, adjusted engine idle, ops check good.

problem: ready to taxi, released parking brake, took 1500+ rpm to get a/c to roll. continued taxi and aircraft felt sluggish and wouldnt "idle roll". tried to engage parking brake and release but still needed high rpm to move.A/C pulled LH on taxi.
action: inspected brakes, found LH side brake caliper not releasing. cleaned LH and RH guide pins and holes. inspected brake linings and discs no defects noted, torqued LH and RH caliper hardware. also inspected Parking brake valve in nose compartment, no defects found. taxied a/c ops check good.

problem: ENGINE IDLE SET TOO HIGH NO MIXTURE RISE.
action: ADJUSTED MIXTURE 2 CLICKS LEAN, AND IDLE 1/4 TURN CCW

problem: ENGINE IDLE SET TOO HIGH NO MIXTURE RISE.
action: OPS CHECK GOOD.

problem: Right mixture extremely difficult to bring to idle cut off.
action: Cleaned and lubed right engine mixture cable. Ops checked good.

problem: Engine did not shut down when pulling mixture to idle cut-off. Had to use magnetos to get engine to stop spinning.
action: Performed ground run up, noticed mixture was stiff moving. Cleaned and lubricated mixture control cable. Performed ground run up. Ops and travel check good.

problem: "Engine had trouble starting, ran rough taxing, large RPM drop on right magneto, engine shutdown on idle check"
action: Started aircraft, tested both mags and idle rpm, could not duplicate problem.

problem: Flight crew reported the aircraft engine stopped moments after touchdown at KIWA and they could not restart.
action: Responded with Airport Operations to runway 12L and assisted the flight crew with a hot engine start proceedure. Found idle speed low (<400 RPM) and mixture setting excessively rich. All other engine indications and operations were normal. Flight crew taxied the aircraft to the Maintenance Hangar.

problem: Issues with left engine on start up and coming out of idle on run up causing a physical shake. On start up would not come above 850 RPM with out trying to shut off with adjusted mixture and throttle.
action: Performed ground run. Engine operations checked good. Could get engines to lean cough when leaned too much when increasing throttle with cold engines, but ops checked good when full rich.

problem: Engine unstable in idle circuit - drops to 450-500 RPM when going to idle from a high power setting.
action: Performed another idle check and mixture setting check during Post Inspection Run-up. Engine idle RPM as expected. No further defects noted.

problem: ENGINE TIME CHANGE DUE
action: Control travel check good. Ran aircraft, adjusted idle speed and mixture setting. Ops and leak check good

problem: RIght engine idle is low.
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment on right engine. Checked good.

problem: "Upon landing at Coolidge and coming to a full stop landing at throttle idle, the engine died.  The fuel pump was not on for the landing.  Restarted the engine and departed to KIWA."
action: Performed ground engine run and found delayed throttle response for about first half of throttle arc coming out of the idle circuit.  Adjusted fuel servo mixture setting 4 clicks to rich.  Performed second ground engine run after adjustments with normal idle/cutoff mixture results.

problem: Idle high, mix. rise is high
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Checked good.

problem: Engine change due
action: Installed exhaust system, filled out log books for old and new engines. Ran aircraft, adjusted idle speed and mixture setting. ops and leak check good. SEE UND WKO# 1240547 for mx flight

problem: IDLING AT AROUND 1050-1100 EVEN WHEN THROTTLE WAS PULLED ALL THE WAY DOWN, FELT NORMAL BUT IDLE IS SET VERY HIGH
action: RAN AIRCRAFT FOUND IDLE AND MIXTURE NEEDED ADJUSTMENT, INSPECTED SERVO ATTACHMENT, NO DEFECTS NOTED, ADJUSTED IDLE AND MIXTURE, OPS CHECK GOOD

problem: Rough idle at 300 rpm's, engine died twice in a row on runup when going idle
action: Allowed aircraft engine to cool down. ran aircraft and adjusted idle speed and mixture. ops check good

problem: On runup RPM dropped down to 540, so I kept power at full for a while then it got better, however after we land rpm dropped to 460.

problem: Engine was idling at 500-550
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment, checked good.

problem: Left engine idle at 470-500
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment on left and right engines. Checked good.

problem: engine ran fine on runup, take off, up until power off stalls. on power off stalls rpm dropped down to 600 rpm. when power was introduced, a/c sputtered for 2 seconds then kicked alive. on the ground after flight a/c ran rough at 1000rpm ranging from 700-1100 RPM

action: Allowed Engine to Cool. Ran Aircraft and Found Idle and Mixture Needed To Be Adjusted. Adjusted Idle and Mixture Settings. Ops Check Good.

problem: on runup, i noticed that the #1 EGT was about 200 degrees higher than the other ones. when testing the magnetos, we didnt have any abnormal drops or engine roughness. i ran a fouled plug checklist, but nothing changed. it also seemed like there was some small abnormal engine vibrations when we conducted both runups, but it may have been the wind.
action: ran a/c, found #1 egt to be within 100 degrees of other probes. noticed idle and mixture settings were off, made seasonal adjustments to idle and mixture. no other defects found, ops check good.

problem: Engine dies upon landing
action: Installed repaired fuel servo P/N: 2576536-2 S/N: 720ETC17.  Performed engine ground run and adjusted fuel servo idle cutoff mixture as required.

problem: On landing in Y37, engine shutdown on runway when throttle was pulled to idle. Got plane started back up and ran 2 run ups with no issues. Returned back to GFK with no issues.

RAN AICRAFT BACK UP STILL NO CHANGE.

problem: ON POST RUN FOUND OIL PRESSURE TO BE 18 AT 740 IDLE.
action: BROUGHT AIRCRAFT BACK IN, DRAINED OIL AND REMOVED OIL FILTER, CUT OIL FILTER OPEN FOUND NO DEFECTS, REMOVED OIL SUMP SCREEN, CLEANED AND FOUND NO DEFECTS, REMOVED ENGINE OIL PRESSURE RELIEF VALVE, FOUND NO DEFECTS.

problem: ON POST RUN FOUND OIL PRESSURE TO BE 18 AT 740 IDLE.
action: INSTALLED NEW OIL FILTER, REINSTALLED SUMPSCREEN AND OIL PRESSURE RELIEF VALVE, SERVICED WITH OIL. NEEDS RUN UP OPS AND LEAK CHECK.

problem: ON POST RUN FOUND OIL PRESSURE TO BE 18 AT 740 IDLE.

problem: ON POST RUN FOUND OIL PRESSURE TO BE 18 AT 740 IDLE.

problem: Autopilot Inspection ICA

problem: During engine run-up, engine dropped to 200 RPM, had to increase throttle to keep engine from dying.
action: Removed and replaced fuel servo with PN: AV2581600 SN: AV26550271. Adjusted idle/mixture setting as needed. Performed ground run-up. Ops and leak check good.

problem: HELD SHORT 9L FOR ABOUT 10-15 MIN, WAS TOLD TO LINE UP QUICKLY, ADVANCED POWER QUICKLY TO MOVE FAST AND BACK DOWN TO IDLE, ENGINE RPM DROPPED TO GREATER THAN 100, TRIED TO START AND WOULDNT ENGAGE, ATTEMPTED TO START AS HOT THEN FLOODED WHICH ALLOWED START TO OCCUR
action: INSPECTED ENGINE, NO DEFECTS NOTED, RAN AIRCRAFT, ADJUSTED IDLE AND MIXTURE, OPS CHECK GOOD

problem: High idle mixture rise
action: Adjusted mixture setting at fuel servo, ops check good.

problem: will not run under 1000rpm
action: ran a/c, adjusted mixture and idle settings, ops check good.

problem: Engine Change
action: Adjusted idle speed and mixture settings

problem: Engine time change due
action: Ran aircraft, Adjusted idle speed and mixture settings, ops and leak check good. See UND WKO 1243448 for mx flight.

problem: during low rpms both on ground and in flight, with the throttle at idle, the a/c has bad shake and vibration. prop feels out of balance. No shake or vibration at higher RPMS. cylinder EGTS all read normal.
action: ran a/c confirmed discrepancy, removed prop and rotated 180 degrees and reinstalled. torqued and safetied prop bolts. ran a/c ops check good.

problem: on runup, found idle and mixture settings need adjustment.
action: adjusted mixture and idle settings, ran a/c ops check good.

problem: During Power off stall, Engine roughness. We did pitch down, full power during recover and engine was rough. After maintain attitude all cyl. EGT within 200
action: Ran engine and cleared spark plugs. Engine operated normally. Magneto drop and idle check within limits. Unable to duplicate reported discrepancy

problem: Engine died in the hold bay.
action: Performed engine run-up,  All engine indications and checks were normal.  Idle was at 500 RPM.   Increased engine idle to 750 rpm.  Operational check good.

problem: idle and mixture need to be adjusted.
action: adjusted idle and mixture, ops check good.

problem: During taxi on the ramp, as soon as throttle went to idle, left engine died
action: Ran A/C and cleared spark plugs off, ops check good on idle on both engines

problem: Idle RPM was 710 and over 50 RPM rise on shutdown.
action: Adjusted mixture two clicks lean.

problem: Idle RPM was 710 and over 50 RPM rise on shutdown.
action: Adjusted mixture two additional clicks lean after post run. Op checked good.

problem: Idle RPM was 710 and over 50 RPM rise on shutdown.
action: Approved.

problem: Throttle is extremely hard to move out of idle position.
action: Turned engine control friction all the way off, cleaned and lubed throttle control cable. Ops checked good.

problem: ENG idle low and mixture rise is high.
action: ran up A/C and adjusted ENG idle and mixture to spec.

problem: While positioning for run-up, enigne was brought to idle. Experienced rapid drop in RPM with a low of 350 RPM.
action: Adjusted throttle mixture setting. Performed ground run-up, ops check good.

problem: lh mixture not hitting stops
action: MADE IDLE AND MIXTURE ADJUSTMENTS. OPS. LEAK CHECK GOOD

problem: During rup up found mixture rise to be to high and idle to be low.
action: Adjusted mixture and idle to spec.

problem: Engine roughness from time of start-up. Engine sputtering with inconsistent RPM.
action: Removed and replaced fuel servo with overhauled, P/N: AV2581600, S/N: AV53190287. Ground ran to set idle and mixture rise. Ops checked good. See WO #1244212 for MX flight

problem: Pilot reports that engine dies at idle and idle RPM is around 250-300 RPM
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Ops checked good.

problem: During taxi (2-3 Kts) engine died and checked low idle. Lowest was 400 RPM with hand pressed and it goes to 600-620 when I released my hand.
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Ops checked good.

problem: Rough idle, dropped up to 50 RPM consistently regardless of power setting.
action: Adjusted fuel servo setting as needed, performed ground run-up, ops check good.

problem: Engine time change due
action: Ran engine, set idle and mixture. Ops and leak check good. See WKO: 1244511 for MX flight

problem: On level off from climb, engine made a sputtering noise and briefly lost 100RPM. After level off mixture was leaned for cruise and a couple minutes later the sputter happened again. EGT's all withing 100deg. of one another. Oil pressure middle of green arc. Oil temp low 200's. Flew back to Grand Forks on opposite tank from when this occured with fuel pump on. No further ocurrences seemed to happen.
action: Performed ground run, could not duplicate disc. Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Fixed Cyl#3 bottom ignition lead end and Cyl# 1&3 top spark spark plug ingnition leads. Performed ground run, Ops checked good.

problem: On run-up, when putting the throttle to idle, the RPM was dropping very low from 600 down to 400 RPM then the engine stopped.
action: Ran up A/C and cleared spark plugs off. Found engine idle to be at specs and engine operating normal. Ops check good

problem: 110 RPM rise with mixture cutoff
action: Adjusted mixture control at fuel servo 2 clicks leaner. Turned idle screw out 1/8 of a turn. Ops check good

problem: A/C NEEDS IDLE AND MIXTURE ADJUSTMENT AT RUN UP
action: Ran rotorcraft. idle and mixture checked good

problem: engine roughness after idle period- 30 seconds descended to do ground ref. maneuvers and around 2200-2300 RPM, engine sputtered and lost 100 RPM. no abnormal runup.
action: assisted

problem: "Plane was at 1100 RPM then went down fast I saw 400 RPM then it died on the runway prior to departing. Started back up and went back to ramp."
action: Ran up aircraft, unable to duplicate discrepancy, idle was low, adjusted.

problem: on runup, throttle idle engine threatened to die rpms low 400's did runup 3 times to ensure results
action: adjusted idle up 1/5th of a turn, tried to run a/c surging too much to check properly.

problem: on runup, throttle idle engine threatened to die rpms low 400's did runup 3 times to ensure results
action: Performed ground run, and seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Checked good.

problem: On runup brought power to idle. Upon reaching idle engine stopped running. Mag drom was fine during check.
action: Performed seasonal idle/mixture adjustment. Ops checked good.

problem: Alternator idler pulley worn out
action: Installed new alternator idler pulley.

problem: Engine died on runway.  Unable to maintain RPM.
action: adjusted idle rpm, problem persisted, cleaned fuel servo, ready for post run.

problem: Engine died on runway.  Unable to maintain RPM.
action: Performed ground engine run.  Adjusted fuel servo idle-cut off mixture.  Operational check good.

problem: On the ground when throttle was pulled to idle while taxiing, RPM read as low as 450 rpm and sounded/felt like the engine was about to quit.
action: Ran aircraft, adjusted idle speed and mixture settings. checks good

problem: During run-up, we did throttle idle at that time engine was shut down.
action: Performed ground run and adjusted idle and mixture speed, ops check good.

problem: Engine shutoff while taxing in after landing, restarted easily. Nearly shutoff a couple more times during rest of taxi.
action: Performed ground run and found idle speed to be low, adjusted idle and mixture speed. Ops check good.

problem: On run up after pulling throttle to idle, RPM dropped to 500 RPM then to 400 RPM then it quit. Restarted it and taxied back.
action: Performed ground run and found idle speed to be low, adjusted idle and mixture speed. Ops check good.

problem: Told "line up and wait". As we turned on centerline the engine shut off. Decided to taxi back to ramp.
action: Performed ground run and found idle speed to be low, adjusted idle and mixture speed. Ops check good.

problem: Engine stalled on final.
action: Leaned mixture to raise idle (3 clicks).

problem: EGT #3 INCORRECT READING WHEN IN FLIGHT. HAPPENED WHEN IDLE EGT SHOT UP EVERY TIME.
action: REMOVED AND REPLACED #3 EGT PROBE WITH NEW. RAN A/C, OPS CHECK GOOD.

problem: On run up found mixture and idle to be low on LH and RH ENG.
action: Adjusted idle and mixture on LH and RH ENG to spec.

problem: On shutdown mixture was idle/cutoff but plane continued to run at around 260RPM for 5-10 sec. Engine finally cut out when throttle was advanced to full.
action: Started and shut off engine multiple times. No defects noted.

problem: Alternator amps spiked during idle after runup until shutdown.
action: Inspected alternator wiring and fuses. Found bad fuse on shunt. Replaced both fuses on shunt. No other defects found.

problem: Alternator amps spiked during idle after runup until shutdown.
action: Ops check good

problem: #1 cyl EGT indicating over 2,000 degrees and then yellow x
action: Ground ran AC, #1 cyl still reading over 200 degrees more during idle and taxi

problem: On run-up found ENG idle to be low and mixture rise to be high.
action: Adjusted idle and mixture to spec.

problem: RPM fluctuated 50-80 RPM at idle.
action: Performed idle/mixture adjustment as needed. Performed ground run-up, ops check good.

problem: During engine shutdown the strudent was unable to shutdown the engine with the throttle closed and mixture in the idle/cut off position. Positive fuel flow was observed on EIS with the mixture in the idle/ cut off position. After multiple attempts of moving the throttle and mixture foward/back the engine shut down
action: Inspected throttle and mixture cables, travel check good. Ran aircraft, checked mixture idle cut off multiple times, ops check good. couldnt not duplicate on ground run.

problem: On post-flight, noticed engine idle at 870 PRM on ground
action: Adjusted Idle speed, checks good

problem: ENGINE DUE TIME CHANGE
action: Assisted. Ran aircraft, set idle and mixture settings. Ops and leak check good

problem: During run up found left magneto to be faulty. With left mag off, RPM dropped 50 RPM. With right mag off, RPM dropped 300 RPM. Tried fouled plug checklist to no improvement
action: Ground ran AC. Mag drops op checked good. Idle was 900 RPM and there was no mixture rise. Adjusted idle and mixture settings. Ops checked good

problem: On run-up found mixture rise to be high and ENG idle to be low.
action: Adjusted mixture rise and ENG idle to spec.

problem: During shutdown checklist after throttle and mixture idle, prop started to come to stop, slowed down then went counterclock wise 2-3 rotations before stopping
action: Found fuel flow divider not shutting off. Removed and replaced with overhauled fuel flow divider P/N AV 2524232-2 S/N AV24733496

problem: During shutdown checklist after throttle and mixture idle, prop started to come to stop, slowed down then went counterclock wise 2-3 rotations before stopping
action: Ops and leak checked good.

problem: "Engine died on rwy 5 @ P08 during ground roll.  Restarted on 2nd attempt, taxied off and shutdown.  Restarted on 1st attempt."
action: Performed ground engine run.  Idle cut-off mixture was within normal operating limits.  Mixture handle was very stiff.  Lubricated mixture cable.  Could not duplicate reported discrepancy.

problem: ENGINE TIME CHANGE DUE
action: ASSISTED, SET IDLE AND MIXTURE OPS AND LEAK CHECK GOOD

problem: 170 RPM rise during pre-run idle mixture cut-off
action: Adjusted mixture 3 clicks leaner.

problem: 170 RPM rise during pre-run idle mixture cut-off
action: During post run RPM rise was 60.

problem: LOW VOLTS AFTER START. KEPT DECREASING FROM 23 VOLTS
action: When running up the aircraft volts were 25 when idle and about 27 when at higher RPM. Could not duplicate.

problem: Verbal pilot report: Aircraft engine died during landing rollout at Gateway (KIWA).
action: Initial ground run-up revealed engine idle circuit unstable and mixture wheel adjustments ineffective.

problem: RH ENGINE CHANGE
action: COMPLETED RH ENGINE CHANGE. SET IDLE, MXTURE, AND PROP GOVERNOR. OPS/LEAK CHECKS GOOD. SEE WKO# 1245408 FOR MX FLIGHT.

problem: "Engine died, student had their hand on throttle.  I started it back up and it ran fine"
action: Adjusted fuel servo idle/shutoff mixture.  Operational check good during ground engine run.

problem: Mixture rise of 70 on pre run
action: Idle and mixture check good

problem: Mixture idle cut-off 100 RPM rise
action: Leaned idle mixture by one click. Operational check good.

problem: Mixture idle cut-off 100 RPM rise
action: Approved

problem: Mixture settings need to be adjusted
action: Adjusted idle speed and mixture settings

problem: Engine time change due
action: Adjusted idle speed and mixture. Ops and leak check good.

problem: Erroneous fuel flow. Fluctuating between 0.0 and 0.6 on idle. Tried 1,000 up to 1,300 RPM, same result. Would work its way down to and stay at 0.0 FF
action: Inspected fuel flow transducer wiring, and ground ran AC. No defects with fuel flow indication noted

problem: "L ALT FAIL" CAS message when left engine is above 1200 RPM. Goes away when eng is idle. Ran single alt fail check, did not resolve. Left alternator was indicating 10 amps.
action: Removed LH and RH alternator regulators and temp installed new ones. Final installation and op check required.

problem: "L ALT FAIL" CAS message when left engine is above 1200 RPM. Goes away when eng is idle. Ran single alt fail check, did not resolve. Left alternator was indicating 10 amps.
action: Completed installation of  Plane Power regulators in PD#2 (left) and PD#3 (right).

problem: "L ALT FAIL" CAS message when left engine is above 1200 RPM. Goes away when eng is idle. Ran single alt fail check, did not resolve. Left alternator was indicating 10 amps.
action: Ran engines and paralleled voltage regulators.  Alternators and regulators test good holding 28.5VDC and carrying equal current, but problem of L ALT FAIL CAS message remains.

problem: on post run found idle to be 900 no mixture rise.
action: adjusted idle to 710 with 20 mix rise. ops check good.

problem: idle is 830 no mix rise.
action: adjusted idle and mixture.

problem: idle is 830 no mix rise.
action: ops check good.

problem: on runup, pulled throttle to idle and engine sputtered at around 450 RPM so we went back to higher RPM setting tried second time same thing, third time making sure we were all the way to idle after 5 seconds it slowly died to around 300 and started to stop when we went back to 1000RPM.
action: ran a/c, found idle and mixture adjustments off, adjusted mixture and idle, ran a/c ops check good.

problem: upon startup engine started with a cold start just fine. brought throttle down to idle and engine died, restarted engine and brought throttle back to idle again and engine died a 2nd time. restarted a 3rd time and idle seemed to have improved but mx told us to write up.
action: ran a/c found mixture and idle needing adjusment, adjusted mixture 2 clicks richer, and adjusted idle to 740, ops check good.

problem: Multiple reports of engine hot-start failures
action: Started aircraft and attempted to adjust the idle RPM and idle mixture. Problem persisted, removed and replaced all spark plugs with new fine wire spark plugs. Found both magentos timed at 27 degrees cylinder #1 BTDC, retimed magnetos to 25 degrees cylinder #1 BTDC.

problem: On post run found engine wanting to die at idle.
action: Adjusted idle and mixture. Ops check good.

problem: On runup found ENG to be idling high.
action: Adjusted ENG idle.

problem: 850 idle no rise on run up
action: Adjusted mixture setting. Ops check good.

problem: Alternator has 3,113.1 hours TIS
action: Installed new alternator idler pulley assembly and tightened alternator belt to spec.  REF M.M. 24-30

problem: Engine due time change
action: OPS/ LEAK CHECK GOOD. IDLE AND MIXTURE ADJUSTMENT REQ.

problem: Engine due time change
action: Idle and mixture check good, See und wko 1247804 for engine break in flight

problem: (airplane off station in warren) pilot reports got annunicator for low oil pressure on final when bringing throttle to idle. tried to do engine runup and battery was dead.
action: Performed ground run and oil pressure checks good. No defects noted.

problem: "Engine did not attempt to crank over. Starter made a clicking noise when pressed. Battery levels all indicate normal."
action: Verified engine start operation on multiple attempts.  Operational check good.  Adjusted Fuel servo idle/cutoff mixture during ground engine run.

problem: On post run found ENG idle to be low and mixture rise to be high.
action: Adjusted ENG idle and mixture to spec.

problem: On runup found idle to be low and mixture rise to be high.
action: Adjusted engine idle and mixture rise to spec.

problem: Maintenance flight required to confirm normal engine operation during idle power maneuvers; Ref WKO# 1246752
action: Performed maintenance flight, and performed many power off stalls in aircraft in different configurations and engine operated normally. Alan Pissas 4464767.

problem: Idle speed and mixture settings require adjustment
action: Adjusted idle mixture one click rich.  Adjusted idle speed to 750 RPM.

problem: Reduced power when entering the pattern, oil PSI dropped to 40 and got a caution. Aflter landing and power idle , oil PSI dropped to 23 PSI and we got a red warning. Taxing back, PSI increased as throttle increased and when we parked it went back to 25 PSI
action: Assisted

problem: #3 cyl was showing 1700 degrees EGT at idle. Came back after runup to normal temp. EGT gauge was not working during flight. Every few mins it would come back then go away. I believe it is an indication issue because run-up was fine and engine performed fine. #3 cyl also showed yellow X in flight.
action: Replaced #3 EGT probe with new. Ops check good.

problem: 30 seconds to 1 minute after starting the R/H engine, it failed. Upon restart, the engine would idle correctly at 500-600 PRM. Increasing throttle to 700- 800 would cause the engine to fail then spudder
action: Ran aircraft allowing engine oil temp and cylinder temps to rise, checked idle and mixture settings. no defects noted. engine operations checks good.

problem: 200 RPM rise during idle mixture cut-off and adjustment wheel against the lean stop
action: Re centered adjustment screw and safetied attachment pin. Performed engine run, mixture checked good.

problem: 200 RPM rise during idle mixture cut-off and adjustment wheel against the lean stop
action: Approved.

problem: Engine has 3,107.8 hours TSO; 5,749.5 hours TT
action: Replaced all eight spark plugs with new. Started engine and performed engine run. Adjusted idle RPM and idle mixture. Engine operated normally and leak check good.

problem: During preflight oil just below 6. Called line and got quart of oil. On runup went idle and flashed low oil pressure. Rechecked and was fine so continued. During taxi low oil pressure warning and remained on at 21 PSI at 900 RPM. Taxied on ramp and decided to return. Low pressure at 21 PSI with 113 oil temp on taxi back
action: Performed ground run of aircraft and could not duplicate discrepancy, oil pressure checks good no defects noted.

problem: On run up while throttle idle oil pressure dropped to 18 PSI and warning/chime. Oil pressure was in the green(20 PSI) when at 1200RPM.
action: Performed ground run of aircraft and found oil pressure to be reading in the green for the entire ground run. Oil pressure stayed above 55 PSI for the entirety of the ground run.

problem: Engine time change due
action: Ran aircraft Adjusted idle and mixture, ops check leak check good, see WO# 1247764 for engine break in flight

problem: Right engine fuel flow went up to 6.6 GPH.   Went mixture idle and turned fuel pump off and it stayed at 6.6 GPH.   After about 30 seconds it slowly started to go down.
action: Checked fuel flow sensor configuration on G1000NXi system.   Disassembled and inspected right fuel flow sender connector.   Replaced CPC connector body with parts from bench stock.    Problem persists.    Ordered replacement fuel flow sender.

problem: Right engine fuel flow went up to 6.6 GPH.   Went mixture idle and turned fuel pump off and it stayed at 6.6 GPH.   After about 30 seconds it slowly started to go down.
action: Removed and replaced right fuel flow sender.   Fuel flow operation is erratic.   0-13 GPH with no fuel flow.   Isolated problem to be linked with switch light dimming.   Found EL Panel inverter, A338 to be causing interference with fuel flow sender.  Removed and replaced DC to AC inverter for lighted instrument panel placards.   Operation tests good.   Fuel flow operation tests good.   Leak check good.

problem: Engine has 3,006.0 hours TSO; 5,443.4 hours TT
action: Performed post run up, adjusted idle speed, leak check good

problem: Engine has 3,006.0 hours TSO; 5,443.4 hours TT
action: Assisted with post run, idle speed adjustment and leak check, good.

problem: During rup-up, tried to bring the throttle to 2000, while passing 1300-1400 RPM we heard popping/exploding sounds. We were never able to get the throttle to 2000 RPM. No indication of anything wrong on engine page.
action: Performed ground run of aircraft. ENG ran smooth from idle all the up through full throttle. Could not duplicate discrep.

problem: On run up noticed RH ENG oil pressure was slightly lower than LH ENG(65 PSI compared to 80 PSI) On climb out oil pressure continued to drop to 56-58 PSI. Ran low oil pressure checklist at 4500 ft with no success. upon landing oil pressure fell below 20 PSI at idle and 30 PSI on taxi.
action: Drainied oil and removed oil filter, sump screen and pressure relief valve. Found small gravel debis in sump screen and oil filter. Serviced with 8 qts oil, Installed new oil filter and reinstalled sump screen and pressure relief valve with new gaskets. Ran engine on ground for 30 minutes, oil pressure acted normal and stable. Drained oil and removed oil filter and sump screen, no defects noted. Serviced with 8 qts oil and installed new oil filter and reinstalled sump screen with new gasket and safetied. Performed ground run up. Leak and ops check good.

problem: Pilot states engine roughness at idle power
action: Performed engine run, could not duplicate engine roughness.

problem: Pilot states engine roughness at idle power
action: Assisted.

problem: ENGINE CHANGE DUE
action: COMPLETED ENGINE CHANGE. RAN A/C. SET IDLE AND MIXTURE. LEAK CHECKS GOOD. SEE WKO 1248191 FOR BREAK IN FLIGHT

problem: Engine roughness during descent. plane idled at about 500 RPM and almost quit at shutdown. During runup engine idled at about 600 rpm.
action: Performed ground run and verified low engine idle. Found three of the four fuel servo mounting nuts loose. Torqued all four fuel servo mounting nuts to spec. Performed another ground run, found idle to still be low. Adjusted idle to spec. Leak check good on fuel servo. Engine ran smooth throughout the entirety of the runup.

problem: AFTER ENGINE START, WE CHECKED OIL PRESSURE AND WAS IN THE GREEN READING 30. WITH AN INCREASE OF RPM, PRESSURE ROSE TO MID 30S WITH THROTTLE IDLE OR LOW RPM SETTING, PRESSURE DROPPED TO 20 AND WE RECEIVED A MASTER WARNING. SINCE WE WERE ON THE RAMP WE TAXIED BACK WITH OIL PRESSURE IN THE GREEN AND SHUT DOWN.
action: PERFORMED OIL CHANGE. INSP OIL FILTER AND SUMP SCREEN. NO DEBRIS NOTED. CLEANED OIL PRESSURE RELIEF. LEAK CHECK GOOD.

problem: Began taxiing out of parking tee on Bravo ramp when engine died at idle power setting.
action: Ran aircraft. Found idle mixture excessively rich.  Adjusted idle speed and mixture. Ops check good.

problem: During run-up oil pressure went down to 15 PSI. Enginge would idle at 750 RPM but would send CAS warning message.
action: Assisted

problem: During run-up oil pressure went down to 15 PSI. Enginge would idle at 750 RPM but would send CAS warning message.
action: Accepted

problem: During run-up oil pressure went down to 15 PSI. Enginge would idle at 750 RPM but would send CAS warning message.
action: Performed ground run of aircraft and verified discrep. Performed oil change. Cut open oil filter and inspected oil sump screen, no defects noted. Removed and inspected oil relief valve, no defects noted. Installed and torqued oil relief valve. Flushed out oil system and oil lines. Removed and replaced oil cooler with overhauled P/N 20710A S/N F19-15659-119.

problem: During run-up oil pressure went down to 15 PSI. Enginge would idle at 750 RPM but would send CAS warning message.
action: Performed ground run of aircraft. Ops and leak check good. Oil PSI stayed above 60 PSI the whole ground run. See WKO# 1248188 for MX flight.

problem: idle rpm is to low
action: adjusted idle from 550 rpm to 750 rpm
